name: Luxury Lifestyle
description: Товар в премиум интерьере где он естественно используется. Роскошно, современно, дневной свет, журнальное качество.
prompt_prefix: Premium lifestyle product photography. Product placed naturally inside a luxurious realistic interior where it would be used. Modern design. Natural daylight through large windows. Magazine editorial quality. Ultra realistic. 8K. The environment supports the product without distracting attention.
composition: Product in natural position within luxurious environment, occupies 40-50% of frame
lighting: Natural daylight, soft diffused window light, subtle warm fill
